channel.title: AI on ~# cr1s1um > /dev/random
channel.description: Recent content in AI on ~# cr1s1um > /dev/random

item.title: /* Agentic Programming with AI: Python Port Scanner on Windows */
item.description: A simple practical example of agentic programming with ChatGPT, Codex CLI, Python, Git and GitHub on Windows. We build a small educational port scanner.

item.title: /* Build Your First Artificial Neuron in C: The Perceptron Made Simple */
item.description: Learn how to build a perceptron in C: your first artificial neuron explained step by step, the foundation of neural networks and machine learning.
